title: Water Rescue Order Capstone
intendedTensionBeat: Three rescues compete, but water exposure should make the first priority clear and the second priority arguable.
intendedReleaseBeat: Correct target order turns a dangerous board into a controlled sequence with one planned dock recovery.
expectedPath: Rescue the most water-threatened puppy first, use a dock-safe pivot, then choose the next exposed target before finishing the safest puppy.
expectedFailMode: Player rescues an easy or emotionally tempting puppy first, delaying the water-threatened target until loss or near-loss.
designNotes: Band capstone. This should prove water rescue order, not just general difficulty. Use three targets only if the order logic is visually clear.
